job_id.description: Id of the job this note is attached to. Job notes are always anchored to a single job and are not shared across jobs.

user_id.description: Id of the Greenhouse user who authored the note.

body.description: Free-text body of the note. Newline characters are stored verbatim and rendered as line breaks in the Greenhouse UI.

visibility.description: Who can see this note. `admin_only_visible` is restricted to users with Job Admin or higher access on the job; `privately_visible` is further restricted to users with the "view and create private job notes" permission on the job.

description: Schema for the 'job_notes' stream, linked to the '/v3/job_notes' endpoint.
